style="shape=offPageConnector;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;verticalAlign=top;align=left;size=0.23529411764705882;spacingLeft=-3;fontSize=16;" value="<div style="text-align: center;"><font><b>Vision Stage to</font></span></li><ul style="padding-left: 20px;"><li><span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">add and maintain TSF&nbsp;</span><span>statements</span></li><li><span>identify and link evidence for TSF statements</span></li></ul></ul>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="230" x="436" y="640" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;backgroundOutline=1;fontColor=#000000;darkOpacity=0.05;fillColor=#FFF9B2;strokeColor=none;fillStyle=solid;direction=west;gradientDirection=north;gradientColor=#FFF2A1;shadow=1;size=20;pointerEvents=1;spacingTop=0;fontSize=13;" value="<font face="Comic Sans MS"><span>"I treat all my docs, specs, quality artifacts the same - simple files in my repo. And I only touch them when things change."</span></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="150" x="476" y="820" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="21" parent="1" style="shape=offPageConnector;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;verticalAlign=top;align=left;size=0.23529411764705882;spacingLeft=-3;fontSize=16;" value="<div style="text-align: center;"><font><b>Vision Stage III</b></font></div><ul style="padding-left: 20px;"><li><span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));"><font>Continually leverage the quality work invested in Stages I&amp;II&nbsp;</font></span></li><ul style="padding-left: 20px;"><li><span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">auto evidence collection</span></li><li><span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">auto quality scoring</span></li><li><span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">auto report publication</span></li></ul></ul>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="230" x="830.5" y="640" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="22" parent="1" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;backgroundOutline=1;fontColor=#000000;darkOpacity=0.05;fillColor=#FFF9B2;strokeColor=none;fillStyle=solid;direction=west;gradientDirection=north;gradientColor=#FFF2A1;shadow=1;size=20;pointerEvents=1;spacingTop=0;fontSize=13;" value="<font face="Comic Sans MS"><span>"Quality score and reporting are simply a build artifact - I can easily introspect the areas that change, need improvement."</span></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="150" x="870.5" y="820" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

font.span: "I treat all my docs, specs, quality artifacts the same - simple files in my repo. And I only touch them when things change."

path.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 231px; height: 1px; padding-top: 575px; margin-left: 820px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
text-align: center;

span.font: Continually leverage the quality work invested in Stages I&II

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 148px; height: 1px; padding-top: 818px; margin-left: 862px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

font.span: "Quality score and reporting are simply a build artifact - I can easily introspect the areas that change, need improvement."
